title: Test Security (Encryption) and SEO Meta Tags
description: Write tests to verify that personal data is encrypted in the database and correctly decrypted in the application. Verify that SEO meta tags and Schema.org scripts are present and correct on the frontend (Nuxt 3).
acceptance_criteria: Tests confirm that email/full_name in DB are stored as encrypted blobs
Integration tests confirm that user data is readable via API correctly
SEO tests (via TestClient or mock request) confirm meta tags and JSON-LD content
Sitemap, robots.txt, and RSS routes return 200 and valid content
